title: Placer Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Placer, with a Z-Score of +3.37. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Placer is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.8 GG. 
 The high humidity of 81% and low wind speed of 6.4 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The lack of cooling, as indicated by an HDD of 0.0 GG, is further contributing to the heat wave's severity.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of this critical event.
agri_impact: Crops at high risk of damage
